revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=914 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:22:01.984796+00 | translation moa=915 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:22:01.995695+00

p.cl: W . dei gratia . Rex Scott’ . Iusticiis suis et vicecomiti suo de Berewic’ . Salutem .

Prohibeo
firmiter . Ne Seruientes uicecomitatus mei de Berewic . Alias habeant Consuetudines
aut alias faciant exactiones In Elemosina mea de Coldingham . et Coldingham . sire  de
Placitis et querelis quas ipsi mouent  quam seruientes mei aliorum vicecomitatuum meorum
Habent in aliis elemosinas meis in terra mea .

Testibus Engalramus . Episcopo de Glasg’ . Nicolao Can
cellario . Dauid olifard’ . Iusticio . Hugone . Ridel . Roberto Auenel .
William by the grace of God king of the Scots to his justices and sheriff of Berwick greeting.

I firmly forbid that the sergeands of my sheriffdom of Berwick should have any customs or make any demands in my alms at Coldingham and Coldinghamshire from the pleas and plaints which they move, which my sergeands of my other sheriffdoms have in my other alms in my land.
As witnesses, Ingram bishop of Glasgow, Nicholas chancellor, David Oliphant justice, Hugh Ridel, Robert Avenel.
